sci_intro_requirement.description: One additional SC&I interdisciplinary course (choose one)

advanced_core_requirement.description: One advanced core course in a Communication area (choose one); prerequisite: COMM200

constraints: Total major credits: 36.
Seven required courses (21 credits): SCI101, one of SCI102/SCI103, COMM200, COMM201, COMM300, COMM380, one of COMM354/355/357/359.
Five upper-level electives (15 credits): at least three at the 300-level or above, at least two at the 400-level.
Minimum GPA of 2.0 required to complete the major.
Students must complete at least 15 Rutgers credits (including SCI101 or SCI103 with a C or better) before declaring the major.
A minor is required unless pursuing a double major; approved minors include DCIM, Gender and Media, Data Science, and others.
notes: Five specializations available: Health and Wellness Communication, Leadership in Organizations and Community, Relationship and Family Communication, Strategic Public Communication and Public Relations, Communication and Technology.

constraints: Total major credits: 39.
Foundation (3 credits): SCI103.
SC&I Interdisciplinary requirement (3 credits): one of SCI101 or SCI102.
Core courses (12 credits): ITI200, ITI201, ITI202, ITI210.
Seven ITI electives (21 credits) chosen from approved ITI course list; at least four at the 300-level or above.
Minimum GPA of 2.0 required for the major.
Students must complete at least 15 Rutgers credits, including SCI103 with a grade of C or better, before declaring.
A minor is required unless pursuing a double major.
notes: Dual-degree pathway available: complete a Bachelor's in ITI alongside the Master of Information (MI).
Capstone options include ITI455 (Capstone in ITI) or a senior thesis.

foundation_requirement.description: One foundation course that establishes a practice or conceptual area (choose one)

practice_electives.description: Two practice-based courses emphasizing skills such as reporting and production

concept_electives.description: Two concept-based courses emphasizing theory and analysis; at least one must be at the 400-level

diversity_requirement.description: At least one course addressing diversity, difference, and social justice (may overlap with other elective categories)

constraints: Total major credits: 36 (33 JMS credits + 3 SC&I interdisciplinary).
SC&I interdisciplinary requirement (3 credits): one of SCI101 or SCI103.
Core courses (6 credits): JMS200 and JMS201.
One foundation course (3 credits) chosen from the approved foundation list.
Two practice courses (6 credits) from the practice course list.
Two concept courses (6 credits) from the concept list; at least one must be at the 400-level.
Four upper-level electives (12 credits) from any JMS offerings; at least two at the 300-level.
At least one diversity, difference, and social justice course required (may be counted in another elective category).
All JMS courses require a grade of C or better.
Students must complete at least 15 Rutgers credits including one of SCI101/SCI103 and Expository Writing before declaring.
A minor is required unless pursuing a double major.
notes: Optional specializations (each 18 credits): Global Media, Sports Journalism, Media Production.
Dual-degree pathway available: combine BA with Master of Communication and Media (MCM).
